summary: Tested Leaflet DraggableMap implementation in BusinessSettingsPage (Location tab) and BusinessRegisterPage (Step 2). All features working correctly: interactive Leaflet map renders, draggable marker visible, address search updates map, 'Arrastra el marcador para ajustar la ubicacion' text visible. Backend accepts latitude/longitude in POST /api/auth/business/register.

BusinessSettingsPage - Tab Ubicacion: Address search updates map and moves marker - PASSED
BusinessSettingsPage - Tab Ubicacion: Location saved successfully (toast 'Ubicacion guardada') - PASSED
BusinessSettingsPage - Tab Ubicacion: No iframe (Leaflet used instead) - PASSED

BusinessRegisterPage - Leaflet references found in page source - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register accepts latitude and longitude - PASSED (status 200)

Backend: POST /api/auth/business/register works without lat/lng (optional) - PASSED (status 200)
critical_code_review_comments: DraggableMap.jsx is well-implemented with proper Leaflet initialization and cleanup
Marker icons loaded from Cloudflare CDN (leaflet 1.9.4) - good fallback for webpack issues
onPositionChange callback properly fires on marker dragend event
BusinessSettingsPage auto-saves location when marker is dragged (good UX)
BusinessRegisterPage Step 2 has separate 'Calle' and 'Núm. ext.' fields as expected
All required data-testid attributes present: interactive-map, location-search-input, location-section, current-location-map
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test businesses during backend testing (TEST_Leaflet_Map_Business, test_null_*, test_noloc_*) - these are in pending status without subscription
context_for_next_testing_agent: Leaflet DraggableMap implementation fully tested. The component uses vanilla Leaflet (not react-leaflet) with proper initialization/cleanup. BusinessSettingsPage Location tab shows interactive map with draggable marker. BusinessRegisterPage Step 2 requires completing Step 1 first (image upload + date selection) so direct navigation to Step 2 is not possible without automation of Step 1. Backend schema (BusinessCreate) accepts Optional[float] for latitude/longitude.

mocked_apis.note: Nominatim (OpenStreetMap) is a public free API - not mocked

drag_instruction_text.text: Arrastra el marcador para ajustar la ubicacion

registration_step2.note: Step 2 requires completing Step 1 first (image upload + date selection)
